nasb.text: There is an evil I have seen under the sun, like an error which goes forth from the ruler—

esv.text: There is an evil that I have seen under the sun, as it were an error proceeding from the ruler:

cnv.text: 在日光之下我看見一件憾事，好像是出於官長無意的錯誤，

ccb.text: 我发现日光之下有一件可悲的事， 似乎是掌权者所犯的错误：

csbs.text: 我看到在日光之下有一种祸患，好像是出自掌权者无意的过错：
